creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 222868
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.25.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.24.1.

A full changelog can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.25.0

This patch is larger than usual as upstream has removed vendoring of its dependencies.

-David
